zh.Copplestone, Devon, England, United King: 英國英格蘭戴文可貝萊斯同
zh.Crediton, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭戴文可雷迪頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Copplestone於大約1354年出生在英國戴文可貝萊斯同時，他的父親Adam de Copplestone33歲，母親Alice de Ferrers29歲。他與Katherine le Graas結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1433年在英國戴文享年80歲，埋葬在英國戴文。

zh-hans.Copplestone, Devon, England, United King: 英国英格兰戴文可貝萊斯同
zh-hans.Crediton, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰戴文可雷迪頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Copplestone于大约1354年出生在英国戴文可貝萊斯同时，他的父亲Adam de Copplestone33岁，母亲Alice de Ferrers29岁。他与Katherine le Graas结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1433年在英国戴文享年80岁，埋葬在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Copplestone was born about 1354, in Copplestone, Devon, England, his father, Adam de Copplestone, was 33 and his mother, Alice de Ferrers, was 29. He married Katherine le Graas. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1433, in Devon, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Copplestone est né environ 1354, à Copplestone, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Copplestone, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice de Ferrers, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Katherine le Graas. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1433, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Copplestone um 1354 in Copplestone, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Copplestone 33 und seine Mutter Alice de Ferrers 29. Er hat Katherine le Graas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1433 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Devon, England und wurde in Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Copplestone è nato il circa 1354 nel Copplestone, Devon, England, il suo padre, Adam de Copplestone, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Ferrers, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Katherine le Graas. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1433, nel Devon, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Devon, England.

ja.Copplestone, Devon, England, United King: イギリスイギリスデボンコップレストーン
ja.Copplestone, Devon, England: イギリスデボンコップレストーン
ja.Crediton, Devon, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスデボンクレディトン
ja.lifeSummary: John de Copplestoneが約1354年にイギリスデボンコップレストーンで生まれた時，父Adam de Copplestoneは33歳，母Alice de Ferrersは29歳であった。Katherine le Graasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1433年にイギリスデボンで80歳で死去し，イギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Copplestone(이)가 대략 1354년 영국 데폰 코플레스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Copplestone(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Ferrers(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Katherine le Graas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1433년 영국 데폰에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰에 묻혔다.

mn.Copplestone, Devon, England, United King: Copplestone, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Crediton, Devon, England, United Kingdom: Crediton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Copplestone nasceu aproximadamente 1354, em Copplestone, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Copplestone, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Ferrers, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine le Graas. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1433, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Copplestone родился около 1354 г. в местности копплестоун, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam de Copplestone было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Ferrers, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine le Graas. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1433 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Copplestone nació aproximadamente 1354, en Copplestone, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Copplestone, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alice de Ferrers, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Katherine le Graas. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1433, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Devon, Inglaterra.
